package rulefixtures

// scenario for nested_linear_join_map_candidate: Nested-loop lookups or joins that could use a map index for O(1) access.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule358NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario358Negative(records []Rule358NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
